problems.title: Scattered Customer Information
problems.description: Sales teams waste valuable time searching for customer information across multiple disconnected systems.

problems.title: Missed Follow-ups and Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Without a systematic way to track interactions, sales reps miss important touchpoints.

problems.title: Lack of Sales Pipeline Visibility
problems.description: Sales managers have no clear, real-time view of pipeline status or performance metrics.

problems.title: Inefficient Lead Management
problems.description: New leads from various sources are manually entered with no standardized process.

problems.title: No Customer Communication History
problems.description: No shared record of previous conversations or commitments across team members.

needs.title: Centralized Customer Database
needs.description: A single searchable repository for all customer information.

needs.title: Automated Task and Follow-up Management
needs.description: Automatic follow-up tasks and reminders based on interactions.

needs.title: Visual Sales Pipeline Management
needs.description: Visual deal progression through stages with metrics.

needs.title: Automated Lead Capture and Routing
needs.description: Automatic lead capture, qualification, and intelligent routing.

needs.title: Comprehensive Activity Tracking
needs.description: Automatic logging of all customer touchpoints.

needs.title: Real-time Reporting and Analytics
needs.description: Customizable dashboards with real-time sales metrics.

needs.title: Mobile Access to Customer Data
needs.description: Full mobile access with offline capability.

functionalRequirements.title: Contact and Company Management
functionalRequirements.description: Database with hierarchical relationships, custom fields, and search.

functionalRequirements.title: Activity Logging Interface
functionalRequirements.description: Logging calls, emails, meetings with timeline view.

functionalRequirements.title: Task Management System
functionalRequirements.description: Tasks with due dates, priorities, and automated creation.

functionalRequirements.title: Pipeline Visualization
functionalRequirements.description: Kanban-style board with drag-and-drop deal management.

functionalRequirements.title: Lead Capture Forms and API
functionalRequirements.description: Embeddable forms and REST API for lead submission.

functionalRequirements.title: Lead Qualification and Scoring
functionalRequirements.description: Scoring system based on attributes and behaviors.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Lead Assignment
functionalRequirements.description: Rule engine for lead routing based on criteria.

functionalRequirements.title: Dashboard and Reporting Engine
functionalRequirements.description: Pre-built widgets and custom report builder.

functionalRequirements.title: Mobile Application
functionalRequirements.description: Native mobile apps with offline caching.

functionalRequirements.title: User and Permission Management
functionalRequirements.description: Role-based access control with team hierarchies.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: SOC2 compliance, encryption at rest and in transit.
